memoryArtifacts.headline: From the Book: The Lowther Family by Hugh Owen
memoryArtifacts.description:
Hugh Lowther VI died on Friday 4 August 1475. His Inquisition Post Mortem which tells
us this also shows that, since his grandfather's death in 1430, the family had acquired more
estates in Cumberland …

memoryArtifacts.headline: From the Book: The Lowther Family by Hugh Owen
memoryArtifacts.description:
On 4 November 1455 Hugh VI was himself picked
for Sheriff but he evidently showed some unwillingness to accept. On 9 December the Privy
Council despatched a letter to him — 'our trusty and well belove …

memoryArtifacts.headline: From the Book: The Lowther Family by Hugh Owens

In November

year. Nomination as a J.P. for the county followed at a time when, provoked perhaps by

zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Lowther於1418年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德洛福黑 卡素時，他的父親Hugh Lowther23歲，母親Mary Anne Derwentwater23歲。他於1415年與Anne De DERWENTWATER在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德洛福黑結婚。他去世於1475年8月4日在他的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在英國維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比 聖 邁克爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lowther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lawther
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lowther   and   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lauder
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Lowther was born in 1418, in Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England, his father, Hugh Lowther, was 23 and his mother, Mary Anne Derwentwater, was 23. He married Anne De DERWENTWATER in 1415, in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom. He died on 4 August 1475, in his hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Lowther est né en 1418, à Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Lowther, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Mary Anne Derwentwater, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne De DERWENTWATER en 1415, à Lowther, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 4 août 1475, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Lowther 1418 in Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Lowther 23 und seine Mutter Mary Anne Derwentwater 23. Er hat 1415 in Lowther, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom Anne De DERWENTWATER geheiratet. Er starb am 4. August 1475 im Alter von 57 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Lowther è nato il nel 1418 nel Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Hugh Lowther, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Mary Anne Derwentwater, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anne De DERWENTWATER nel 1415, nel Lowther, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 4 agosto 1475, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowtherが1418年にイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエル カストルで生まれた時，父Hugh Lowtherは23歳，母Mary Anne Derwentwaterは23歳であった。1415年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエルでAnne De DERWENTWATERと結婚した。彼は1475年8月4日に故郷で57歳で死去し，イギリスウエストモーランドアップレビー スト ミチャエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther(이)가 1418년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 로터 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Lowther(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Anne Derwentwater(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 로터에서 Anne De DERWENTWATER(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1475년 8월 4일 그의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비 스트 믹하얼에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Lowther nasceu em 1418, em Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Lowther, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Mary Anne Derwentwater, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne De DERWENTWATER em 1415, em Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1475, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Lowther родился в 1418 г. в местности лоутир кастл, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Lowther было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Anne Derwentwater, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne De DERWENTWATER в 1415 г. в местности лоутир, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 4 августа 1475 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности эпплеби ст мачаел, вестморланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Lowther nació en 1418, en Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Lowther, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Mary Anne Derwentwater, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anne De DERWENTWATER en 1415, en Lowther, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1475, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, Inglaterra.
